revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-000

Concrete which is delivered to site ready for use.


Note: The materials are loaded into a concrete mixer on the delivery vehicle at the suppliers, and mixed during the delivery journey.

{{IALAFooter}}
